content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Organizations are desperately focusing on innovation in today's world. We're building products that are smarter, smaller, and quicker than ever before, and we're making services more accessible than ever before. What's the end result? Embedded computers can be found in a wide range of devices, from computer servers to refrigerators, and from energy meters to pacemakers. The majority of these systems must store and retrieve data from databases. Databases have always played a role in cyber investigations and will continue to do so in the future.
Contenu de la matière
Security and Information technology
Authentication
Access Control
Querying Encrypted Data
Protecting Database-to-Database Communications
Security Auditing
Security Testing
Reacting to an Incident
Forensics Analysis
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen
Références
• Database Security 1st Edition, by Alfred Basta
